commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Like as a lion that is greedy of its prey, and as it were a young lion lurking in secret places. Augustine of Hippo 11. "As a lion ready for prey, have they taken Me" (ver. They have taken Me, like that adversary who "walketh about, seeking whom he may devour. " "And as a lion's whelp dwelling in secret places. " And as his whelp, the people to whom it was said, "Ye are of your father the devil:" meditating on the snares, whereby they might circumvent and destroy the just One.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
